name: teachable-hackathon
description: Teachable Mastra admin assistant monorepo. Use Node.js 22 LTS (engines.node >=22.13.0). npm scripts: lint, typecheck, test, test:coverage, codegen:admin-api, build:packages, build, ci. CI build order: build:packages → codegen:admin-api → test:coverage → lint → typecheck (see npm run ci).

scripts.build:packages: npm run build:admin-openapi-parser && npm run build:admin-tools-codegen && npm run build:admin-http-client
scripts.codegen:admin-api: npm run codegen:admin-api -w @teachable/admin-tools-codegen && npm run codegen:admin-api -w teachable-mastra-admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @teachable/admin-openapi-parser && npm run lint -w @teachable/admin-tools-codegen && npm run lint -w @teachable/admin-http-client && npm run lint -w teachable-mastra-admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @teachable/admin-openapi-parser && npm run typecheck -w @teachable/admin-tools-codegen && npm run typecheck -w @teachable/admin-http-client && npm run typecheck -w teachable-mastra-admin
scripts.test: npm run test -w @teachable/admin-openapi-parser && npm run test -w @teachable/admin-tools-codegen && npm run test -w @teachable/admin-http-client && npm run test -w teachable-mastra-admin
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @teachable/admin-openapi-parser && npm run test:coverage -w @teachable/admin-tools-codegen && npm run test:coverage -w @teachable/admin-http-client && npm run test:coverage -w teachable-mastra-admin
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run codegen:admin-api
scripts.ci: npm run build:packages && npm run codegen:admin-api && npm run test:coverage && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
